CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Continued To Apr-24-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Al Baldini is present. Represented by Anthony Holz.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Juan Hernandez is present. Defendant Nelsa Guerra is not present.
Attorney Joshua Cruz representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-23-2012 remains on calendar.
